summary: Director Mission Control redesign fully verified. All 10 features pass: compact context strip (118px), white inbox with 'Needs Attention' header, human-readable labels (not 'Escalation'), 'Name — School' dash format, priority dots (red/amber), teal CTAs, outbox strip with dot separators, 5 collapsed sections with working toggle, no duplicate NeedsAttentionCard.
critical_code_review_comments: DirectorView.js correctly implements all required features
DirectorInbox.js properly maps system labels to human-readable text
All data-testid attributes properly set for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Director Mission Control redesign complete. Compact hero (~118px), white inbox with 'Needs Attention', human-readable labels, outbox strip, 5 collapsed sections. Test IDs: director-mission-control, director-hero, director-inbox, inbox-list, inbox-row-{id}, outbox-strip, section-program-insights, section-recruiting-signals, section-coach-health, section-upcoming-events, section-activity.

verified_features.1_compact_context_strip: PASS - Height 118.5px, contains greeting, 5 KPIs, momentum indicator, date badge
verified_features.2_white_inbox_background: PASS - Background rgb(255, 255, 255), NOT dark themed
verified_features.3_inbox_header: PASS - Shows 'Needs Attention' with count badge (8) and 'View all' link
verified_features.4_inbox_row_format: PASS - Priority dot + 'Name — School' + issue label + time ago + teal CTA
verified_features.5_human_readable_labels: PASS - 'Needs follow-up', 'Awaiting reply', 'No coach assigned', 'Stalled' - NO 'Escalation' jargon
verified_features.6_outbox_strip: PASS - '5 awaiting response · 2 critical pending · 2 in progress · 4 resolved this week' with dot separators
verified_features.7_collapsed_sections: PASS - All 5 sections (Program Insights, Recruiting Signals, Coach Health, Upcoming Events, Activity) collapsed by default
verified_features.8_section_toggle: PASS - Clicking expands section to show content
verified_features.9_no_duplicate_card: PASS - NeedsAttentionCard and EscalationsCard completely removed
verified_features.10_inbox_clickable: PASS - Rows navigate to correct CTA URLs (e.g., /support-pods/athlete_2)
